name: MDB Capital Holdings, LLC
summary: PART I Introduction MDB Capital Holdings, LLC (MDB) serves as a foundational platform specializing in financing startups, partnering with co-founders, and fostering value creation. This platform sets the stage for nascent ideas and entrepreneurial talent to take root. MDB is comprised of a group of companies that together serve as this unified foundational platform.
